videoSnippet.title: Chess Still Speaking! || Hans Niemann vs Alireza Firouzja || Super Rapid & Blitz Poland 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Gukesh D (2646) - Sindarov, Javokhir (2662) 
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Poland 2026 (Chess.com) [26] 2026.05.07
B92 Sicilian, Najdorf, Opovcensky variation

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 d6 5.O-O Bd7 6.c3 g6 7.d4 Bg7 8.Re1 Nf6 9.Nbd2 O-O 10.Nf1 exd4 11.cxd4 b5 12.Bc2 Bg4 13.Be3 Nd7 14.Rc1 Bxf3 15.gxf3 Qf6 16.d5 Nce5 17.f4 Nc4 18.b3 Nxe3 19.fxe3 Rfe8 20.Ng3 Rac8 21.Qg4 Qe7 22.Qf3 c5 23.dxc6 Rxc6 24.Bb1 Rc5 25.b4 Rc4 26.Rxc4 bxc4 27.Bc2 d5 28.a3 a5 29.Rb1 axb4 30.axb4 Nb6 31.exd5 Qxe3+ 32.Qxe3 Rxe3 33.d6 Rc3 34.Be4 f5 35.Bc6 Rd3 36.Bb5 Rxd6 37.Rc1 Rd4 38.Ne2 Re4 39.Kf2 c3 40.Kf3 Rxb4 41.Bd3 Nd5 42.Rb1 Rxb1 43.Bxb1 Nb4

0:01 Hello Everyone!

02:25 CNG (Ne8)
